issues.detail: The skill does not handle error scenarios such as missing files or GPU unavailability.
The skill assumes a Python environment and may not work with non-Python agents.

scenarios.name: Count and annotate cars with YOLO11
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ultralytics YOLO11, iterates result.boxes with box.cls/box.conf filtering by model.names, and calls results[0].save() exactly as the skill teaches; baseline reaches for older yolov5 patterns.

scenarios.name: TensorRT FP16 export for production
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the one-liner model.export(format='engine', half=True) and reloads via YOLO('.engine'); baseline takes the slower ONNX+trtexec path that misses the ultralytics-native export documented in the skill.
